title: astragalus tricarinatus
intro: Astragalus tricarinatus, also known as milkvetch or huang qi, is a plant species native to China and Mongolia, belonging to the legume family. This perennial herb is valued for its adaptogenic and medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus tricarinatus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus tricarinatus is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
